name: cancel_booking
description: Cancel an existing Cal.com booking by its ID or UID. You can optionally provide a cancellation reason that will be included in the notification sent to attendees. This action is irreversible; the booking status changes to 'CANCELLED' and the time slot becomes available again.

parameters.name: bookingId
parameters.description: The numeric ID or UID of the booking to cancel.

parameters.name: cancellationReason
parameters.description: Optional reason for cancellation, sent to attendees in the notification.

data.title: 30 Minute Meeting between Jane Smith and John Doe
